name: MiraeAsset Inverse S&P500 ETN(H)
summary: Mirae Asset Inverse S&P500 ETN (H) is an Exchange Traded Note that aims to provide the inverse (opposite) return of the S&P 500 index. This means it is designed to increase in value when the S&P 500 decreases, and vice versa; further details on the exact inverse ratio would need further research. The headquarter location would also need further research.
